---
title: "Pygo_gene_enrichment (UPDATED)"
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "6/6/25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

##############################################################################
## Transcriptomics → GO / KEGG → Reactome enrichment (Gallus gallus)        ##
## + Diagnostics & extra visualisations                                     ##
##############################################################################

## 0.  CONFIGURATION  =========================================================
input_file   <- "pygo_MAIN.csv"     # ← change to your file name
species_name <- "chicken"           # ReactomePA expects this for Gallus gallus
kegg_code    <- "gga"               # KEGG organism code
padj_cutoff  <- 0.05                # adjusted‑P threshold
logFC_cutoff <- 1                   # NEW: minimum |log2FC| to call “biologically relevant”
topN         <- 300                 # OPTIONAL: limit to strongest N up & down genes

## 1.  SETUP  -----------------------------------------------------------------
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

cran_extras <- c("ggraph","igraph","graphlayouts","ggforce",
                 "ape","scatterpie","UpSetR","EnhancedVolcano")
need_cran <- cran_extras[!sapply(cran_extras, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(need_cran)) install.packages(need_cran, dependencies = TRUE)

bio_pkgs <- c("clusterProfiler","ReactomePA","pathview","biomaRt",
              "AnnotationDbi","dplyr","ggplot2","openxlsx",
              "ComplexHeatmap","circlize","enrichplot")
need_bio <- bio_pkgs[!sapply(bio_pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(need_bio)) BiocManager::install(need_bio, update = FALSE, ask = FALSE)

if (!requireNamespace("org.Gg.eg.db", quietly = TRUE))
  BiocManager::install("org.Gg.eg.db", update = FALSE, ask = FALSE)

##  -- load libraries ---------------------------------------------------------
library(clusterProfiler)
library(ReactomePA)
library(pathview)
library(biomaRt)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(UpSetR)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(enrichplot)
library(org.Gg.eg.db)
orgDb <- org.Gg.eg.db

dir.create("output", showWarnings = FALSE)

## 2.  READ DIFFERENTIAL EXPRESSION TABLE  ------------------------------------
tbl <- read.csv(input_file, check.names = FALSE) %>%
        rename(gene = 1, logFC = 2, padj = 3)

## 3.  ID‑MAPPING (Symbol → Entrez)  ------------------------------------------
gene2entrez <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  orgDb, keys = tbl$gene, columns = "ENTREZID", keytype = "SYMBOL"
)

tbl <- left_join(tbl, gene2entrez, by = c("gene" = "SYMBOL")) %>%
       filter(!is.na(ENTREZID))

## 4.  DEFINE UNIVERSE & TEST SET  -------------------------------------------
gene_universe <- as.character(tbl$ENTREZID)

tbl_sig <- tbl %>%
           filter(padj < padj_cutoff, abs(logFC) >= logFC_cutoff) %>%
           arrange(desc(logFC))

if (!is.null(topN) && nrow(tbl_sig) > 2*topN) {
  tbl_sig <- bind_rows(
    head(tbl_sig,  topN),      # strongest up
    tail(tbl_sig,  topN)       # strongest down
  )
}

sig_genes <- tbl_sig$ENTREZID %>% unique() %>% as.character()

cat(sprintf(
  "\\nUniverse: %d genes  |  Test set: %d genes (%.1f%% of universe)\\n",
  length(unique(gene_universe)),
  length(sig_genes),
  100*length(sig_genes)/length(unique(gene_universe))
))

## 5.  OVER‑REPRESENTATION ANALYSES  ------------------------------------------
ego <- enrichGO(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                OrgDb = orgDb, ont = "BP", pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                readable = TRUE)

ekegg <- enrichKEGG(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                    organism = kegg_code, keyType = "ncbi-geneid",
                    pAdjustMethod = "BH")
if (!is.null(ekegg) && nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg)) > 0)
  ekegg <- setReadable(ekegg, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

ereact <- enrichPathway(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                        organism = species_name, pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                        readable = TRUE)

## 6.  GSEA (preranked)  -------------------------------------------------------
ranks <- tbl %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>%
         transmute(ENTREZID, rnk = logFC) %>% tibble::deframe()

gsea_go <- gseGO(geneList = ranks, OrgDb = orgDb, ont = "BP",
                 pAdjustMethod = "BH")
if (!is.null(gsea_go) && nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0)
  gsea_go <- setReadable(gsea_go, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

## 7.  PREPARE DATA FRAMES WITH GENE LISTS  -----------------------------------
mk_df <- function(res_obj, id_col = "geneID") {
  if (is.null(res_obj) || nrow(as.data.frame(res_obj)) == 0) return(data.frame())
  as.data.frame(res_obj) %>%
    rename(Genes = !!id_col)
}

df_GO      <- mk_df(ego,      "geneID")
df_React   <- mk_df(ereact,   "geneID")
df_KEGG    <- mk_df(ekegg,    "geneID")
df_GSEA_GO <- mk_df(gsea_go,  "core_enrichment")

## 8.  WRITE EXCEL  -----------------------------------------------------------
write.xlsx(
  list(GO_ORA   = df_GO,
       KEGG_ORA = df_KEGG,
       Reactome = df_React,
       GO_GSEA  = df_GSEA_GO),
  file      = "output/enrichment_results_with_genes.xlsx",
  overwrite = TRUE
)

## 9.  VISUALISATIONS  --------------------------------------------------------

## 9a. Volcano plot of DE results & highlighted test set
pdf("output/volcano_plot.pdf", width = 7, height = 6)
EnhancedVolcano(tbl,
  lab         = tbl$gene,
  x           = "logFC",
  y           = "padj",
  xlab        = bquote(~Log[2]~ "fold change"),
  pCutoff     = padj_cutoff,
  FCcutoff    = logFC_cutoff,
  selectLab   = tbl_sig$gene,
  pointSize   = 2,
  labSize     = 3
)
dev.off()

## 9b. Barplot of logFC distribution
pdf("output/logFC_bins_barplot.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
bin_fac <- cut(abs(tbl$logFC), breaks = c(0,1,2,4,8, Inf),
               labels = c("<1","1‑2","2‑4","4‑8",">8"))
barplot(table(bin_fac), main = "Distribution of |log2FC|", ylab = "Gene count",
        xlab = "|log2FC| bins")
dev.off()

## 9c. UpSet plot of overlap in enriched terms
if (nrow(df_GO) || nrow(df_KEGG) || nrow(df_React)) {
  cat("\\nBuilding UpSet plot…")
  term_lists <- list()
  if (nrow(df_GO))   term_lists$GO_BP   <- df_GO$Description
  if (nrow(df_KEGG)) term_lists$KEGG    <- df_KEGG$Description
  if (nrow(df_React))term_lists$Reactome<- df_React$Description

  upset_data <- fromList(term_lists)
  pdf("output/upset_enrichment_terms.pdf", width = 7, height = 5)
  UpSetR::upset(upset_data, order.by = "freq",
                mainbar.y.label = "Shared terms",
                sets.x.label = "Term count")
  dev.off()
}

## 9d. Enrichment network (cnetplot) for GO BP ORA
if (nrow(df_GO)) {
  pdf("output/cnetplot_GO_ORA.pdf", width = 9, height = 8)
  cnetplot(ego, showCategory = 10, node_label = 'all', circular = FALSE)
  dev.off()
}

## 9e. Quick dot‑plots (unchanged)
pdf("output/dotplots.pdf", width = 9, height = 6)
if (nrow(df_GO))      dotplot(ego,      showCategory = 15, title = "GO BP ORA")
if (nrow(df_KEGG))    dotplot(ekegg,    showCategory = 15, title = "KEGG ORA")
if (nrow(df_React))   dotplot(ereact,   showCategory = 15, title = "Reactome ORA")
if (nrow(df_GSEA_GO)) dotplot(gsea_go,  showCategory = 15, title = "GO GSEA (preranked)")
dev.off()

## 10.  OPTIONAL: KEGG PATHVIEW  ---------------------------------------------
if (nrow(df_KEGG)) {
  top_pathway <- ekegg$ID[1]
  pathview(gene.data  = setNames(tbl$logFC, tbl$ENTREZID),
           pathway.id = top_pathway, species = kegg_code,
           out.suffix = "logFC", kegg.native = TRUE)
}

cat("\\n✓ All done!  Check the 'output/' folder for Excel + plots.\\n")


```
